project_type: Python desktop app (PySide6 GUI + Typer CLI + library) for Salesforce translation workflows
build_system: setuptools via pyproject.toml, editable install with pip install -e '.[gui,dev]'
test_framework: pytest with conftest.py fixtures; 203 tests; QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen for GUI tests
verification_instructions: 1. pip install -e '.[gui,dev]' (must include rapidfuzz). 2. pytest -q (all tests pass). 3. Run 'stx translate --help' and confirm --fuzzy-threshold flag is visible.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET -- full network access. Python 3.11 default. No Docker needed.
contribution_requirements: Follow ruff linting (line-length=100, target py39). Use dataclasses. Tests go in tests/. GUI tests use QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen.
key_patterns: TranslationMemory is a dataclass wrapping SQLite. The runner checks TM before calling the translator. CLI uses typer with rich output. GUI uses PySide6 with workers (QThread). Settings persist via QSettings. Entry is a frozen dataclass with key/label/translation/approved fields.
directory_structure: src/stx/ (core library), src/stx/gui/ (PySide6 desktop app), src/stx/gui/pages/ (one module per phase), src/stx/translate/ (translator backends + runner), tests/ (pytest suite)
